titleStmt.title: SII 34.189: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 189. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the rock near a spring behind the Harāḷakēśvari temple on the hill.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman Rājēndra I, 21st year = A.D. 1033.

Registers a sale of land, freed from taxes, by the sabhā of Ariñjikai-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Uṟaiyūr-kūṟṟam in Kēraḷāntaka-vaḷanāḍu to the temple of Śrīkayilāsam alias Madhurāntak-Īśvaram at Rājēndrachōḻa-pēṭṭai in Mīykōṭṭu-nāḍu. A part of the sold land was lying fallow for some fifteen years past as the owner had absconded without paying taxes. Consequently the the land was sold in government auction (Rājēndrachōḻa-peruvilai) for the tax arrears; the sabhā purchased it and was keeping it as public property. [For some inexplicable reasons this and the following inscription (190), belonging to different villages are inscribed on the rock in Ratnagiri hill even though they have nothing to do with the local village or the temple on the hill].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭan=taiyum pOrceya pāvaiyum cīrtaṉiccelviyun tan peruntEviyarāki Inneṭutiyar Ūḻi Uḷḷiṭai nāṭum tuṭarvaṉavEli paṭar
vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭa līḻattaraicartamuṭiyum Āṅkavar tēviyar Ōṅkeḻil
muṭiyum muṉnavarpakkalt teṉṉavaṉ vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum Intiran ṉāramum teṇṭirai maṇṭalamuḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik kēraḷar muṟaimaiyil cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palar
pukaḻmuṭiyum ceṅkatirmālai ceṅkatir vēlaittol peruṅkāval palapaḻantīvum ceruvilc ciṉavil Irupattorukālaracu kaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mēvarum cān=timaṟṟīvaraṇ karuti I
ruttiya cempoṟ ṟiruttakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta jeyaśiṅkaṉ Avaṉaḷap peruppukaḻkaḻer pīṭiyal Iraṭṭapāṭi Ēḻarai Ilakkamu mīnavar netikkula
pperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavīra cakkarakōṭṭamum maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷar nāmaṇaik kōṇaiyum veñciṉaivīrappañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaip paḻana mācuṇi tēcamum Ayarvil
vaṇkīrtti Ātinakaravayil viḷaiyamarkkaḷattu kiḷaiyōṭum piṭittup palataṉattōṭuniṟaikulataṉakkuvaiyum kiṭṭarumceṟimuṉai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum
pūcarar cēr nal kōcalaināṭum tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉai Aḻittu vaṇṭuṟai cōlait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukattākki takkaṇa kītti takkaṇalāṭamum
kōvin=ta can=taṉ māviḻintōṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷatēcamum toṭukaṭaṟ caṅku kōṭṭai mayipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal Iyāṉaiyum peṇṭir
paṇṭāramum nittil neṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamum veṟimalar tīrtta teṟipuṉal kaṅkaiyum Alai kaṭal naṭuvuḷ palakalañcelutti caṅkirāma vijaiyatuṅka panmanākiya kaṭārattaraiyaṉai vā
kayam porukaṭal kumpakkariyōṭu makappaṭutturimayil piṟakkiya peruneti piṟakkamum Ārttavaṉanakanakar pōrttoḻil vācalil vijādharatōraṇamum mottoḷipuṉai
maṇiputavamum kaṉamaṇikkatavamum niṟaicīr vijayāya turai śirppanmaiyum malaiyuraiyiṟ ṟoṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiraṭiṅkamum kalaṅkāval viṉaiilaṅkā
cōkamum kāppeṟuniṟai puṉaṟ māppappāḷamum kāvalampuricai mēvilimpaṅkamum viḷaippaintūṟuṭai vaḷaippaintūṟum kalaittak kōrpukaḻ talai takkōlamum titamāvali vi
ṉaimā tamaliṅkamum kalāmutir kaṭuntiral Ilāmuritēcamum tēṉakkar poḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaṭaṟkāval karumuraṭkaṭāramum māpporutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kōp
parakēcaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājentracōḻa devarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 1 Irupattoṉṟāvatu kēraḷāntaka vaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūrk kūṟṟattu brahmadeyam Ariñcikai sa
turvvetimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm Iṟaikāval Āka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilavilai Āvaṇam Innāṭṭu mīykōṭṭu nāṭṭu Irājentracō
ḻappēṭṭai śrīkaiyilāsamāṉa śrīmaturāntaka Īśvaramuṭaiya mahādevar mūla vrittiyaṉ caṇṭēśvaradevaṟku nāṅkaḷ cantirātittavalam Iṟai Iṟuttuk
kuṭukka kaṭavōmāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilaṅkaḷāvaṉa Eṅkaḷur mīy piṭākai vākaivāyil śrīaraṅkavāykkālukkut teṟkkum cōḻa cōḻamātēvi vatikkuk kiḻakku
ṇṇāṟṟum 2āṅ kaṇṇāṟṟum 3āṅ kaṇṇāṟṟum 4ām kaṇṇāṟṟum 5āṅkaṇṇāṟṟum 3āñ catiraṅkaḷil 1āṅkaṇṇāṟṟum mēṟkaṭaiya Akappaṭa
kkuk kiḻakku naṅkaivāykkālukku teṟku vaṭakkaṭaiya sabhaippotuvāyk kiṭanta nilam Eṅkaḷūrpaṭi nilam 1 vēliyum śrīdharaṅka vāykkālukkut teṟkuc cō
ḻamātēvivatikkuk kiḻakku 3āṅkaṇṇāṟṟum 4āṅkaṇṇāṟṟum 2ām catiraṅkaḷil naṅkaivāykkālukku vaṭakku vaṭakku vēṅkippurattu Iruṣikē
civaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭu Uṭaiyōmāy sabhaiyōmitāy Irunta nilam Orukāṇi 4 m kiṅkiṇiceppamum nārāyaṇakkiramavittaṉ makkaḷ muṉpu niṉṟu
Iṟai Iṟātump patiṉaiñcu samvasarattiṉ Uttēcam Iṟai Iṟātu kuṭipōka Ivarkaḷukku nāṅkaḷ Iṟuttu Irājēntracōḻap peruvilaiyāl Uṭaiyō
māy sabhaiyōmitāy Irunta nilam 1 kāṇi Āka nilam Innilam Araikkāluṭppaṭa sabhaiyō nilam Araiyum Āka nilam 1(1/2) yum Innilam Oṉṟaraikkum nāṅkaḷēy can
tirātittaval Iṟai Iṟuttukkuṭukkakkaṭavōmāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttuk koṇṭa vilaipporuḷ kuṟṟa maṟṟaṉa kōyil tēvamūvātaṉ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 3 100 8 10 Ikkācu muṉṉūṟṟu
Eṇpatuṅ koṇṭu Innilam Oṉṟarai nilam Iṟaikāvalāka viṟṟukkuṭuttōm Iccaṇṭēśvaradevaṟku Ivvaṟiñcikaic caruppētimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyō
m Innilattukku Ituvēy vilaiyāvaṇamum porumāvaṟutip poruṭcilavum Ituvē Āvatākavum Ituvallatu vēṟu porumāvarutip poruṭcilavu kāṭṭa
kaṭavarallātārākavum Innilañcuṭṭi vanta peruvari cilvari Eccōṟu veṭṭi vētiṉai kulaikurampu ceynīrveṭṭi Uḷḷiṭṭut tiruvācalil pōnta kuṭimai
Eppēṟpaṭṭatum nāṅkaḷēy ceyyakkaṭavōmākavum Innīr veṭṭip pāccikkoḷḷap peṟuvārākavum Ipparici Ikkācu muṉṉūṟṟeṇpatum Āvaṇakkaḷiyil
l Aṟakkoṇṭu Innilam 1(1/2)m Oṉṟaraiyum paṭiyē kalveṭṭik koḷḷap peṟuvārāka Ipparicu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟakko
ṇṭu viṟṟuvilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttōm Ivvi māna śrīmaturāntaka Īśvaramuṭaiyār mūlavṛttiyan
daṇeṭEśvara devaṟku Ivvaṟiñcikai saruppEtimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟit tannū nārayaṇa sahasraṉnum tiruppu
moci Ilakutti kēcuvanum ci lakā ṉum paṇiyāl
ti l Ivvūr madhyastan nākaṉvaikāvaṭikāḷāṉa saṉañ carasa Eḻuttu [35-40 siṅnatures much worn Out]
Digital edition of SII 34.189 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
